backend.blocker: GitHub Actions Render Auto-Deploy workflow is missing RENDER_API_KEY and RENDER_SERVICE_ID repository secrets

remainingBlockers: Add RENDER_API_KEY to GitHub repository secrets (repo Settings > Secrets and variables > Actions)
Add RENDER_SERVICE_ID to GitHub repository secrets (repo Settings > Secrets and variables > Actions)
Re-run the 'Render Auto-Deploy on Push' workflow or push a new commit to trigger backend deploy

Fix TypeScript errors in backend/ivx-blocker-fix-migration.ts, backend/ivx-blocker-fix.test.ts, backend/services/ivx-browser-automation.ts, backend/services/ivx-lender-network-engine.ts, backend/services/ivx-video-resumable.ts, expo/lib/supabase-env.ts if E2E pipeline must pass
